title: MINT Lib
description: Library Mod for MINT Gaming Studios Mods
body:
# MINT Lib

**What is this?**

MINT Lib is a required library mod created by MINT Gaming Studios. It contains shared code and functionality used by our other mods, such as Fishing+ and |comming soon|

**Do I need it?**

You only need to download this mod if it's listed as a dependency for another MINT Gaming Studios mod you want to play.
The CurseForge launcher will usually handle this for you automatically.
This mod does nothing on its own and adds no new items or features to the game. It simply allows our other mods to work correctly.
